title: LaunchPadZ
description: LaunchpadZ is a plugin that when u step on any pressure plates  launches u forward For Paper/Spigot 1.20 - 1.21.1
body:
# LaunchPadeZ

place down any pressure plat to launch players forward 
good for hubs/spawns 

## config
```
# Launchpad Configuration
# Power of the launch. 1.0 is default, 2.0 is double, etc.
# There is no limit.
launch-power: 2.0 
```
